prestazioni: FCA-sourced 6.2L supercharged Hellcat V8 (engine code: **Hellephant 717**) with forged internals, including a billet crankshaft, forged pistons (Mahle Motorsport), and H-beam connecting rods (Manley Performance), paired with a custom Hennessey 3.0L Whipple supercharger (24 psi boost) and a ported throttle body (BBK Performance 103mm).

Full titanium exhaust system (Hennessey x Borla) with 3.5-inch mandrel-bent piping, quad 5-inch carbon-fiber tips, and a bypass valve system (Vibrant Performance) for on-demand backfire tuning, reducing backpressure by 42% over stock.

Custom ECU calibration (Hennessey HPE1000) with a standalone fuel system upgrade, including dual 450 LPH fuel pumps (Walbro 450), 1050cc injectors (ID1050x), and a methanol injection kit (Snow Performance Stage 3) with a 5-gallon tank and progressive controller for E85 compatibility.
estetica: Full carbon-fiber widebody conversion (Hennessey x Rocket Bunny TRX kit) with extended fenders (3.5-inch flares), custom front splitter, and a massive rear diffuser with integrated LED lighting (Oracle Lighting).
Forged aluminum wheels (HRE FF03, 22x12 front / 22x13 rear) wrapped in 35-inch Nitto Ridge Grappler tires (325/50R22) with beadlock rings (Method MR701) for extreme off-road grip.

Custom interior overhaul featuring full Alcantara upholstery (Hennessey x Katzkin), carbon-fiber trim (VIS Racing), and a digital dash upgrade (HP Tuners MPVI3 Pro) with real-time boost, AFR, and methanol flow monitoring.
